meaning: n.树桩,残余,断株,烟蒂,用突了的笔,存根adj.短而秃的vt.挖除断株,连根拔除,踩熄adj.短而秃的
examples: I have every cheque stub we've written since 1959.
She would sit there drawing with the pencil stub.
He pulled the stub of a pencil from behind his ear.
Eliminating stub quotes is easy enough, however, and it actually gives the SEC something they can do.
As part of the application she gave authorities access to her tax returns and a recent pay stub.
